description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.
name: Recipe: Alchemist's Stone

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Alchemist's Stone Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Alchemy (350) Requires The Sha'tar - Revered Use: Teaches you how to make an Alchemist's Stone. Sell Price: 2 Alchemist's Stone Item Level 90 Binds when picked up Unique Trinket +15 Strength +15 Agility +15 Stamina +15 Intellect +15 Spirit Requires Alchemy (350) Equip: Increases the effect that healing and mana potions have on the wearer by 40%. This effect does not stack. Sell Price: 2 50 Requires Philosopher's Stone , Earthstorm Diamond , Skyfire Diamond , Fel Lotus (2), Primal Might (5) This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.
